title: minuartia subuniflora
intro: Minuartia subuniflora, also known as the alpine rock-jasmine, is a low-growing, perennial plant species native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and promoting wound healing. Minuartia subuniflora can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil for its medicinal uses.
